message:
feat(ci): add CI workflow and fix TypeScript strict mode issues

- Add GitHub Actions CI workflow with quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests)
- Add E2E smoke test on PRs
- Fix TypeScript strictness issues for exactOptionalPropertyTypes
- Update Biome to 2.3.11 schema format
- Add @types/bun for Bun runtime types
- Disable useLiteralKeys rule (conflicts with noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature)
- Add bun.lock for reproducible installs

Closes: flywheel_gateway-hnv

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  quality:
+    name: Quality Gates
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Type check
+        run: bun run typecheck
+
+      - name: Lint
+        run: bun lint
+
+      - name: Unit tests
+        run: bun test
+
+  e2e:
+    name: E2E Smoke Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium
+
+      - name: Start gateway
+        run: bun run dev:gateway &
+        env:
+          PORT: 3000
+
+      - name: Wait for gateway
+        run: |
+          for i in {1..30}; do
+            if curl -s http://localhost:3000/health > /dev/null; then
+              echo "Gateway ready"
+              exit 0
+            fi
+            sleep 1
+          done
+          echo "Gateway failed to start"
+          exit 1
+
+      - name: Run E2E tests
+        run: bun test:e2e
+        env:
+          CI: true
